title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly automating software engineering and research tasks within AI development, including code writing, review, and experimentation. Both Anthropic and OpenAI are raising concerns about accelerating AI self-improvement and have called for coordinated governance frameworks to manage development risks.
